pages.text:
On the way we passed through __Hartley Wintney__ + stopped to see Peter + Belinda. We shared supper on the kitchen table - we provided Bacon sandwiches + they contributed smoked salmon. We saw to goats, dogs, birds + rabbits too.
      On [the] to __Farnham__, + after the children were in bed on the drive we chatted to Mary + Richard, her parents, brother, [Lee/Bec], wife, Deana + their children while they all had lasagna. Richard Hendon was there too.
   The next [Sunday] day we walked to the church, It rained. George got lost twice. We went to the reception at [?Quenetter] + saw Jane + Harry, Sally + her family + David Maxine + the girls, Tim with a dreadful beard with his family + the new arrival Cains.
   We got home about 7pm.
~~Saturday~~ Friday October 22nd.
   The seven of us set off for __London__ at 10.20. We arrived at Pickett's lock, [?sa] [?Vallba leisure] centre. (Cinema) *** Depressing too, but nice to come home to a movie. The managers were abrupt.
   The weather was marvellous all 3 days.
      Simon, V+A ; Thomas Planetarium + Sims; William, Planetarium + Sims; Peter Planetarium +

British museum; John Planetarium + films.
Charles Planetarium + films, Eve V+A Ivories + Liberties.
   We had lunch + bought day tickets + went to the Victoria + Albert Museum. We saw beautiful ivories + an Elizabethan portrait. We had tea. We went into the Friends of the V+A room + had tea + saw [?Chad Hadkins].
   We tried to get tickets for Starlight Express at the Adelphi, but there weren't any. We saw the Chad lights in the bar upstairs.
   We bussed + trained back, queued for movie tickets + gobbled supper in the movies. E, T, W, P went to the Net; E, J, C, went to Pocahontas.
   Sunday We had a frustrating journey into London, + arrived in time for a sung [?Each] at Westminster Abbey, + glimpsed Peter Portal. We lunched at Pizza Hut + went on to the Planetarium. The films made Eve feel sick + brought on a migraine to add to her tooth ache.
   We had Tea watching tennis in Regents Park.
   We returned to the campsite.
TWSJC saw Apollo 13, E+P saw 9 Months. We had supper in the van before the movies

__Monday October 24th__
      We set off to Libertys & looked for material for Simon's dressing gown, bought Eve a rugby-watching brown coat & [illegible] velvet scarf. Peter bought a CA, John bought a candle.
      We had a delicious lunch at the Newman Arms, off Tottenham Court Rd.; Eve had steak & [?fried] kidney pudding & spotted dick & custard.
      We saw the Egyptian section & the peat bog man in the British Museum. Jane Total was out.
      We had an icecream in a park & trained & bussed back to the cinema car park.
      We are driving home up the motorway. ETA 7.50.
